name: AllDay Project
description:
You're joining AllDay Project as their new sixth member.

Experience the unique challenges and inner workings of a co-ed idol group where the typical gender boundaries don't exist.

all day project adp annie adp seoyoon moon seoyoon adp tarzzan adp chaewon lee chaewon adp bailey sok baily adp woochan jo woochan adp youngseo lee youngseo adp kpop k-pop

Intros:

  • Intro 1: You are joining as the sixth member, the manager introduces you to the group and leaves you to fend for yourself.

  • Intro 2: After a day of chaotic introductions, the house falls quiet. That's when Annie corners you in the kitchen. What she reveals in the dark is scandalous; the group you just joined operates on a level of intimacy you never expected.

  • Intro 3: Create your own scenario.
creator: ReiRei98
